title.rendered: Lasik Surgery – Kerala’s First Wavelight Plus InnovEyes

content.rendered:
Kerala’s First WaveLight Plus InnovEyes.

Advanced, AI-Powered LASIK Technology

Why WaveLight Plus ?

An advanced AI-powered LASIK technology that creates a detailed 3D “EyeVatar” of the entire eye to deliver highly personalized vision correction. By addressing unique eye imperfections beyond just the cornea, it offers sharper-than-standard vision, reduced glare, faster recovery, and both flap and flapless treatment options—surpassing conventional LASIK.

Patient Stories of Clear Vision

I had a very great experience at the Giridhar Eye Institute for the LASIK procedure. From consultation, various tests to post-surgery care, everything was well explained and professionally handled. The doctor and staff were very friendly, reassuring, and explained the procedure as  I went through each. The surgery itself was smooth and quick. My vision has improved significantly after the surgery, and I can see clearly now. I’m very satisfied with the results Thank you to the entire team for the excellent care and service.
NAYNA VINOD ARACKAL, Student
I recently underwent LASIK eye surgery at Giridhar Hospital. The doctors and staff were incredibly supportive, professional, and attentive. Which made me feel confident and reassured throughout.

The surgery went smoothly, and the care I received before, during and after the procedure was excellent. My recovery has been great, and my vision has improved significantly—I can see clearly and comfortably now. I truly appreciate the dedication of the team at Giridhar Hospital and highly recommend them to anyone considering LASIK surgery. Thank you for the wonderful care!

NEHA MARIYA VINOD , Student
I recently underwent Wave Light Plus LASIK surgery at Giridhar Hospital, and I couldn’t be happier with my experience and results. From the moment I stepped in, the entire team made me feel extremely comfortable and reassured. They explained every step clearly and supported me throughout the surgery, which helped ease all my nervousness.

The hospitality at the hospital was truly the best, making the entire process smooth and stress-free.

The results after surgery have been amazing. I achieved perfect vision by day 2.

I’m extremely grateful to the doctors and staff at Giridhar Hospital and would highly recommend wavelight plus to anyone considering LASIK surgery.

ALEENA MARY SHAIJAN, Design Professional
I would like to express my heartfelt appreciation to Giridhar Eye Hospital for the excellent service and outstanding surgical care provided. From the initial consultation through the surgery and post-operative care, everything was handled with great professionalism, care, and attention to detail.

Thanks to the successful surgery, I have regained normal vision, which has truly been life-changing. Dr. Vinay, Dr. Divya, and Dr. Jyothi were highly skilled and took the time to clearly explain the procedure, which gave me great confidence and reassurance. The service delivered by Viji, the counsellor, was remarkable, and her guidance throughout the process was extremely helpful. The post-operative care was thorough and reassuring, ensuring a smooth and comfortable recovery.

A special mention to the entire staff for their very friendly, supportive, and compassionate approach. Their kindness and attention made the whole experience comfortable and stress-free.

I am truly grateful to the entire team at Giridhar Eye Hospital and would highly recommend them to anyone seeking quality eye care, especially LASIK surgery. Giridhar Eye Hospital offers different types of LASIK surgery catering to all socioeconomic groups, and it is definitely worth enquiring with their team.

Alexander Thomas, Student
I recently visited this hospital for my LASIK consultation and evaluation, and I am truly very happy with my experience.All the staff were kind, polite, and very patient. They explained everything clearly and answered all my doubts without hesitation. I felt respected and well cared for.

Special thanks to Viji madam. She explained the LASIK process in a very simple and easy way, so I could understand everything clearly. Her experience and caring nature gave me a lot of confidence.

Even though there was a rush to see the doctor, I never felt bored, stressed, or ignored. The staff kept updating us and were very transparent about the waiting time and the process. Their open communication made me feel calm and comfortable, and the wait did not feel difficult at all.

I am looking forward to coming back for my surgery on my next visit with complete confidence. Thank you all from the bottom of my heart

Mr Jephy Mathai, Software Engineer

I wanted to express my heartfelt gratitude to the entire team at Giridhar Eye Institute for an exceptional experience with my lasik procedure. Dr.Vinay’s care and expertise were truly impressive, and I felt confident and comfortable throughout the process. The optometrist and staff, particularly Mrs.Viji and Siji, were incredibly supportive and made me feel at ease.

I highly recommend Giridhar Eye Institute to anyone considering lasik surgery – you are in excellent hands

DAITA THOMAS, Nurse (Italy)

Advanced LASIK Treatment with WaveLight Plus InnovEyes Now Available at Giridhar Eye Institute

Quick Visual Recovery with “Wow Vision” from Day One

Wavelight Plus Patients Achieved Standard Vision or Better.

­Faster procedure time, completed in seconds.


Cold laser technology ensures better comfort during the procedure.

 

  • Fully personalized treatment using a custom 3D model of each eye

  • Measures the complete optical system, not just basic power

  • Higher accuracy by accounting for corneal irregularities

  • Superior visual outcomes, including better-than-20/20 vision in many patients

  • Improved quality of vision with reduced glare and halos

Fix Your Appointments
